rapid_ko.observation: Speaker identity changes to a different voice, even though that alternate voice is not inherently bad.

large_interval_ko.observation: Severe tearing and unnatural note connections.

other_cases.observation: Overall review is still a release-blocking fail.

findings: Phoneme transitions sometimes sound like fades or staccato rather than continuous singing.
Some syllables are so quiet that they are hard to distinguish from noise.
Rapid passages can switch to a different speaker identity.
Metallic and robotic artifacts remain excessive.
Pitch and rhythm accuracy are insufficient for vocal-synth use.
Large intervals tear severely and connect unnaturally.
quality_target: Production vocal-synth quality comparable in usability to Kasane Teto; accurate pitch and timing with stable identity and natural note connections.
